overview: The EPIC Storm archetype is a Legacy combo deck that utilizes a four-color mana base to assemble a high-storm-count spell sequence. By leveraging signature mana accelerants like Lion's Eye Diamond and Mox Opal alongside card selection tools, the pilot aims to cast a storm spell on turn two or three. Burning Wish provides critical flexibility to fetch missing combo pieces or interaction from the sideboard. Success relies on precise sequencing and protecting the combo from disruption.
win_conditions: Casting a storm spell with a high storm count to resolve multiple copies simultaneously
Using Lion's Eye Diamond and Mox Opal to generate excess mana for turn-two or turn-three combos
Fetching missing combo pieces or interaction with Burning Wish to close out the game

keep_criteria: Hands with two or more lands and a cantrip like Brainstorm or Ponder
Hands containing Mox Opal or Lion's Eye Diamond alongside a land
Hands with early interaction like Force of Will or Daze
mulligan_criteria: Hands with only one land and no mana rocks
Hands lacking card draw or combo enablers
Hands with multiple lands but no way to draw into the storm spell

early_game: Play lands and mana rocks to establish a fast mana base
Use cantrips to dig for the storm spell and combo pieces
Hold up interaction to protect against early disruption
mid_game: Sequence spells to maximize the storm count before casting the win condition
Use Burning Wish to fetch sideboard interaction or missing combo pieces
Manage the stack carefully to ensure the storm spell resolves
late_game: If the combo is disrupted, transition to a control game plan using fetched interaction
Use card advantage to outlast opponents while searching for a second combo attempt
Leverage excess mana to cast multiple spells in a single turn

key_cards.name: Burning Wish
key_cards.role: Fetches missing combo pieces or sideboard interaction
key_cards.notes: Use to find Epic Storm, additional mana rocks, or answers to the opponent's threats

key_cards.name: Lion's Eye Diamond
key_cards.role: Generates a burst of mana and card draw
key_cards.notes: Cast with sufficient mana to pay the life cost, then use the generated mana to cast the storm spell

key_cards.name: Mox Opal
key_cards.notes: Play on turn one if you have a nonbasic land, or use it to enable turn-two combos

key_cards.name: Brainstorm
key_cards.notes: Use to dig for the storm spell while discarding low-value cards to maintain hand size

key_cards.name: Force of Will
key_cards.notes: Hold up to protect the combo from early disruption or to counter key opponent spells

sequencing_tips: Cast cantrips before mana rocks to maximize the storm count
Hold up interaction until you know the opponent's hand or play
Use Lion's Eye Diamond after other mana sources to ensure you can pay the life cost
Cast the storm spell last to ensure it resolves with the highest possible count

matchups.advice: Prioritize early interaction and fast mana to combo before they apply lethal pressure
Use Burning Wish to fetch sideboard answers and protect your combo with multiple layers of counterspells
Race to cast your storm spell while using interaction to disrupt their sequence
